zone.description: Single Scaleway zone for all machines (e.g. fr-par-1). Use regions for multi-zone/multi-region distribution.

regions.description: List of regions to distribute machines across. Each entry declares the zones to use within that region and an optional private network. Takes precedence over zone.

zones.description: Zones within this region to use.

zone.description: Scaleway zone. Must belong to the parent region.

commercial_type.description: Instance type for this zone (e.g. PRO2-M). Overrides region and global commercial_type.
Instance type for this region (e.g. PRO2-M). Overrides the global commercial_type for all zones in this region.

network_id.description: Optional Private Network UUID to attach instances to. Scaleway Private Networks are regional and span all zones in a region.

commercial_type.description: Default Scaleway instance type, e.g. DEV1-S, GP1-XS, PRO2-S. Can be overridden per region or per zone.

image_id.description: UUID of a Talos OS image pre-uploaded to Scaleway (zone-specific). Use image_name for multi-zone setups.

image_name.description: Base name of a Talos OS image. The provider selects the image matching the zone arch automatically (e.g. "talos-v1.12.6").

arch.description: CPU architecture. Inferred automatically from the instance type if not set.

disk_size_gb.description: Root disk size in GB (default: 40). Must respect the instance type local SSD limits.

tags.description: Optional tags to apply to the Scaleway instance.
